query.description: Search for records by entering search queries of your choice

lookup.description: Search for the name or email address of records

business_type_id.description: ID of the business that the account belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

city.description: City that the contact belongs to

country.description: Country that the contact belongs to

industry_type_id.description: ID of the industry that the account belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

number_of_employees.description: Number of employees in the account

owner_id.description: ID of the user to whom the deal is assigned. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

parent_sales_account_id.description: Parent account ID of the account

state.description: State that the contact belongs to

territory_id.description: ID of the territory that the deal belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

zipcode.description: Zipcode of the region that the contact belongs to

creater_id.description: ID of the user who created the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

is_allday.description: Whether it is an all-day appointment or not

latitude.description: Latitude of the location when you check in on a sales activity

longitude.description: Longitude of the location when you check in for a sales activity

outcome_id.description: ID of the outcome of the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

targetable_id.description: ID of contact/account against whom appointment is created

time_zone.description: Timezone that the contact belongs to

campaign_id.description: ID of the campaign that landed this deal. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

contact_status_id.description: ID of the contact status that the contact belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

job_title.description: Designation of the contact in the account they belong to

keyword.description: Keywords that the contact used to reach your website/web app

lead_source_id.description: ID of the source where deal came from

lifecycle_stage_id.description: ID of the lifecycle stage that the contact belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

medium.description: Medium that led your contact to your website/webapp

mobile_number.description: Mobile phone number of the contact

sales_accounts.description: Accounts which contact belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

subscription_status.description: Status of subscription that the contact is in

subscription_types.description: Type of subscription that the contact is in

work_number.description: Work phone number of the contact

base_currency_amount.description: Value of the deal in base currency

currency_id.description: ID of the currency that the deal belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

deal_payment_status_id.displayName: Deal Payment Status Name or ID
deal_payment_status_id.description: ID of the mode of payment for the deal. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

deal_pipeline_id.description: ID of the deal pipeline that it belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

deal_product_id.description: ID of the product that the deal belongs to (in a multi-product company). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

deal_reason_id.description: ID of the reason for losing the deal. Can only be set if the deal is in 'Lost' stage. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

deal_stage_id.description: ID of the deal stage that the deal belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

deal_type_id.description: ID of the deal type that the deal belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

probability.description: Probability of winning the deal as a number between 0 and 100

sales_account_id.description: ID of the account that the deal belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

sales_activity_outcome_id.displayName: Sales Activity Outcome Name or ID
sales_activity_outcome_id.description: ID of a sales activity's outcome. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

task_type_id.description: ID of the type of task

accountId.description: ID of the account to update

view.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

query.description: Enter a term that will be used for searching entities

entities.description: Enter a term that will be used for searching entities

searchField.description: Field against which the entities have to be searched

customField.description: Only allowed custom fields of type "Text field", "Number", "Dropdown" or "Radio button"

entities.description: Use 'entities' to query against related entities. You can include multiple entities at once, provided the field is available in both entities or else you'd receive an error response.

dueDate.description: Timestamp that denotes when the task is due to be completed

taskId.description: ID of the task to update
